response.text:
I can tell from the run context that the MSO6B connected successfully over PyVISA and saved a screenshot to ./screenshots/screenshot.png.

I can’t directly inspect the attached PNG in this chat, though. If you want waveform/measurement analysis, tell me what part to look at — for example:
- trigger point
- channel activity
- measurements
- protocol decode
- any glitch/noise area

Or re-upload and describe what looks suspicious.
